title: MWOOT 144Pcs Mini Roses Artificial Flower Heads, Pink Plastic Rose Buds with Stems for Crafts, Small Fake Roses for DIY Valentine's Day Wedding Bouquet Festival Decoration, Tiny Faux Flower Heads
features: Packages Includes: A total of 144 mini artificial flower heads for crafts DIY.

Size: Each rose bud is approximately 1.5 cm in diameter. Each rose flower head with stem. The stem is about 9 cm long, flexible thin wire stem easily bent, very convenient for you to embellish flowers on headbands, hats, clothes, garlands, baskets, photo albums, scrapbooks and other craft items. Unleash your creativity and enjoy the happy DIY time.

Material: The artificial roses are made of high-quality plastic, which can maintain the beautiful flower shape for a long time, will not fade easily over time, and can be reused. Green leaves are added at the bottom of the flowers, they look lush and vibrant, adding a touch of color to the artificial roses.
Crafts Art Accessories: Use these real touch rose flower heads to create centerpieces, clothing decorations, bouquets, flower baskets, and more.

Wide Application: Fake mini roses are perfect for weddings, parties, anniversaries, Valentine's Day, Christmas, bridal showers, Mother's Day, adding more romance and vitality to these scenes. Also perfect for everyday home and garden decoration.
